sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 10.9 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.10)

statement.latex: Let$p$be a prime number and let$L_p$denote the set of all quasivarieties each of which is generated by a finite$p 0.1ex$-group. Is$L_p$a sublattice of the lattice of all quasivarieties of groups? { A.\,I.\,Budkin} No, not always (S.\,A.\,Shakhova, Math. Notes, { 53}, no.\,3 (1993), 345--347).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
